item.title: The irony of filming this intro and then screwing up. That was n...
item.description:
View on TikTok


The irony of filming this intro and then screwing up. That was not planned! It’s true though - but I sent it, screwed up, and (won’t repeat) this one!
#treehouse #build #construction #tinyhouse #cabin #cabin #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp

item.title: DON’T WORRY, I Slapped it and said “thats not going anywhere...
item.description:
View on TikTok


DON’T WORRY, I Slapped it and said “thats not going anywhere” so it’s locked in for eternity.
#treehouse #build #construction #tinyhouse #cabin #fyp #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp

item.title: This is gonna look SWEET 😎 Huge thanks to Blika for hooking u...
item.description:
View on TikTok


This is gonna look SWEET 😎 Huge thanks to Blika for hooking us up with all the cable railing we need! This is part 1 of whats going to be a multi part series getting these installed on the treehouse and there will be a long for video coming out on my YouTube channel!
#treehouse #build #construction #cabin #tinyhouse #fyp #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp

item.title: Get Your Windone E2 Electric Bike & Use Code SAE2 for $ off ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Get Your Windone E2 Electric Bike & Use Code SAE2 for $ off - plus you help ya boi out! All links right here 👇 5% Off Fans Code: SAE2 WindOne E2 Fat Tire Off Road Adventurer: https://windone.com/products/windone-e2-fat-tire-electric-bike Find More WindOne Ebike: hhttps://windone.com/
#treehouse #offgrid #solar #homestead #fyp #fyppp #foryou

item.title: Should We Burn Plastic? Theres a reason they say cleanliness is ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Should We Burn Plastic? Theres a reason they say cleanliness is next to Godliness. Always able to think better with a clean treehouse and a clean truck. Truck has to be clean at all times non negotiable.

item.title: Was this the right choice? Im thinking I will stain the wooden r...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Was this the right choice? Im thinking I will stain the wooden rail caps the same color and it’ll all blend really nicely. I got the first pieces in for the cable rails today, and the rest is going to trickle in through the week, super excited! Check out ! #treehouse #reels
@marysadventure_

item.title: I may have over complicated this, that one little hole was proba...
item.description:
View on TikTok


I may have over complicated this, that one little hole was probably enough but oh well. This off grid solar powered well project has been pretty interesting, each solution leads to a new problem which requires another solution, but it’s working really well right now. Next step is to run irrigation underground to sprinkler heads in the fruit orchard, and add a timer. The treehouse is run off a separate, much deeper and more powerful well.
#treehouse #offgrid #cabin #solar #fyp #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp

item.title: Major mistake fixed…I really debating flipping the boards over...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Major mistake fixed…I really debating flipping the boards over to a fresh side but they had marks from the joists so I decided against it. I’ll probably sand and stain the whole treehouse deck when I finish construction, right now it gets beat up, but Im glad I did this for peace of mind.
#treehouse #build #construction #cabin #fyp #foryoupage
